description_long: This is a stylized tombstone with a classic arched top and a broad, tiered rectangular base. The front face of the tombstone features a carved skull and crossbones symbol above the large, engraved letters 'RIP', giving it a distinctly somber and slightly ominous appearance. The stone is rendered in a uniform dark gray color, suggesting it is made of granite or a similar durable stone. The sides and back of the tombstone are plain, with no visible inscriptions or decorations. The structure is solid and blocky, with sharp, clean edges and a matte finish. Its size and design indicate it is intended as a grave marker in a cemetery or graveyard setting.
description: A dark gray, arched tombstone with a skull and crossbones and 'RIP' engraved on the front, set on a broad rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain arched face and the tiered base, with no visible inscriptions.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the tombstone and the stepped base, with no engravings visible.
description_view_2: Front view with a skull and crossbones symbol and 'RIP' inscription clearly visible on the arched face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thickness and plain side of the tombstone.
